temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A middle-aged man with graying hair, wearing a gray suit jacket over a striped shirt, sits at a dinner table. He holds chopsticks and gestures with his hand while speaking, looking slightly annoyed. The table is set with several dishes, and a woman in a black dress stands behind him with her hand on her hip. (Storyline: The scene opens on a dinner conversation, establishing a tense or impatient mood as the man speaks.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Impatient, slightly loud. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint chatter from other diners.)
(00:04-00:07) The camera cuts to a close-up of the man's face as he continues to speak. He looks to his right, off-camera, and explains that he hasn't eaten at this place in a long time, implying he's not familiar with the surroundings or the people there. (Storyline: The man justifies his presence at the restaurant, suggesting he is out of his element and trying to get something done quickly.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Matter-of-fact, a bit defensive. 2) Background sounds or music: Continued faint restaurant ambiance.)
